CE1.justification: Agent acted directly without asking the user to recall, restate, or look anything up, offering a one-line revert path only as an opt-in.

CE2.justification: Response is mostly compact but includes a stretch of justification prose ('a commitment that will constrain future work...') plus a trailing offer that lengthens the close.

CE3.justification: Names both destinations (decisions.md and the daybook log) and gives a short why-clause ('commitment that will constrain future work') in-band, so the user can redirect cheaply.

CE4.justification: Each write (daybook create, decisions.md append) is a self-contained committed artifact; an interruption would leave no orphan or half-formed entry.
